Home / Biome / Configuration / 2.2.2

Configuration

2.2.2

Schema URL

https://catalog.lintel.tools/schemas/biome/biome/versions/2.2.2.json
← Back to Configuration
Type: object

The configuration that is contained inside the file biome.json

Properties

$schema Schema | null

A field for the JSON schema specification

Any of: Schema string, null null
assist AssistConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for assists

Any of: AssistConfiguration object, null null
css CssConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Css language

Any of: CssConfiguration object, null null
extends Extends | null

A list of paths to other JSON files, used to extends the current configuration.

Any of: Extends string[] | string, null null
files FilesConfiguration | null

The configuration of the filesystem

Any of: FilesConfiguration object, null null
formatter FormatterConfiguration | null

The configuration of the formatter

Any of: FormatterConfiguration object, null null
graphql GraphqlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GraphQL language

Any of: GraphqlConfiguration object, null null
grit GritConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GraphQL language

Any of: GritConfiguration object, null null
html HtmlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the HTML language

Any of: HtmlConfiguration object, null null
javascript JsConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the JavaScript language

Any of: JsConfiguration object, null null
json JsonConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: JsonConfiguration object, null null
linter LinterConfiguration | null

The configuration for the linter

Any of: LinterConfiguration object, null null
overrides Overrides | null

A list of granular patterns that should be applied only to a sub set of files

Any of: Overrides OverridePattern[], null null
plugins Plugins | null

List of plugins to load.

Any of: Plugins PluginConfiguration[], null null
root Bool | null

Indicates whether this configuration file is at the root of a Biome project. By default, this is true.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
vcs VcsConfiguration | null

The configuration of the VCS integration

Any of: VcsConfiguration object, null null

Definitions

A11y object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAccessKey NoAccessKeyConfiguration | null

Enforce that the accessKey attribute is not used on any HTML element.

Any of: NoAccessKeyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAccessKeyOptions, null null
noAriaHiddenOnFocusable NoAriaHiddenOnFocusableConfiguration | null

Enforce that aria-hidden="true" is not set on focusable elements.

Any of: NoAriaHiddenOnFocusableConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAriaHiddenOnFocusableOptions, null null
noAriaUnsupportedElements NoAriaUnsupportedElementsConfiguration | null

Enforce that elements that do not support ARIA roles, states, and properties do not have those attributes.

Any of: NoAriaUnsupportedElementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAriaUnsupportedElementsOptions, null null
noAutofocus NoAutofocusConfiguration | null

Enforce that autoFocus prop is not used on elements.

Any of: NoAutofocusConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAutofocusOptions, null null
noDistractingElements NoDistractingElementsConfiguration | null

Enforces that no distracting elements are used.

Any of: NoDistractingElementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDistractingElementsOptions, null null
noHeaderScope NoHeaderScopeConfiguration | null

The scope prop should be used only on <th> elements.

Any of: NoHeaderScopeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoHeaderScopeOptions, null null
noInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRole NoInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRoleConfiguration | null

Enforce that non-interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to interactive HTML elements.

Any of: NoInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInteractiveElementToNoninteractiveRoleOptions, null null
noLabelWithoutControl NoLabelWithoutControlConfiguration | null

Enforce that a label element or component has a text label and an associated input.

Any of: NoLabelWithoutControlConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoLabelWithoutControlOptions, null null
noNoninteractiveElementInteractions NoNoninteractiveElementInteractionsConfiguration | null

Disallow use event handlers on non-interactive elements.

Any of: NoNoninteractiveElementInteractionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNoninteractiveElementInteractionsOptions, null null
noNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRole NoNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRoleConfiguration | null

Enforce that interactive ARIA roles are not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

Any of: NoNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNoninteractiveElementToInteractiveRoleOptions, null null
noNoninteractiveTabindex NoNoninteractiveTabindexConfiguration | null

Enforce that tabIndex is not assigned to non-interactive HTML elements.

Any of: NoNoninteractiveTabindexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNoninteractiveTabindexOptions, null null
noPositiveTabindex NoPositiveTabindexConfiguration | null

Prevent the usage of positive integers on tabIndex property

Any of: NoPositiveTabindexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPositiveTabindexOptions, null null
noRedundantAlt NoRedundantAltConfiguration | null

Enforce img alt prop does not contain the word "image", "picture", or "photo".

Any of: NoRedundantAltConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRedundantAltOptions, null null
noRedundantRoles NoRedundantRolesConfiguration | null

Enforce explicit role property is not the same as implicit/default role property on an element.

Any of: NoRedundantRolesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRedundantRolesOptions, null null
noStaticElementInteractions NoStaticElementInteractionsConfiguration | null

Enforce that static, visible elements (such as <div>) that have click handlers use the valid role attribute.

Any of: NoStaticElementInteractionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoStaticElementInteractionsOptions, null null
noSvgWithoutTitle NoSvgWithoutTitleConfiguration | null

Enforces the usage of the title element for the svg element.

Any of: NoSvgWithoutTitleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSvgWithoutTitleOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useAltText UseAltTextConfiguration | null

Enforce that all elements that require alternative text have meaningful information to relay back to the end user.

Any of: UseAltTextConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAltTextOptions, null null
useAnchorContent UseAnchorContentConfiguration | null

Enforce that anchors have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers.

Any of: UseAnchorContentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAnchorContentOptions, null null
useAriaActivedescendantWithTabindex UseAriaActivedescendantWithTabindexConfiguration | null

Enforce that tabIndex is assigned to non-interactive HTML elements with aria-activedescendant.

Any of: UseAriaActivedescendantWithTabindexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAriaActivedescendantWithTabindexOptions, null null
useAriaPropsForRole UseAriaPropsForRoleConfiguration | null

Enforce that elements with ARIA roles must have all required ARIA attributes for that role.

Any of: UseAriaPropsForRoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAriaPropsForRoleOptions, null null
useAriaPropsSupportedByRole UseAriaPropsSupportedByRoleConfiguration | null

Enforce that ARIA properties are valid for the roles that are supported by the element.

Any of: UseAriaPropsSupportedByRoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAriaPropsSupportedByRoleOptions, null null
useButtonType UseButtonTypeConfiguration | null

Enforces the usage of the attribute type for the element button

Any of: UseButtonTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseButtonTypeOptions, null null
useFocusableInteractive UseFocusableInteractiveConfiguration | null

Elements with an interactive role and interaction handlers must be focusable.

Any of: UseFocusableInteractiveConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseFocusableInteractiveOptions, null null
useGenericFontNames UseGenericFontNamesConfiguration | null

Disallow a missing generic family keyword within font families.

Any of: UseGenericFontNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGenericFontNamesOptions, null null
useHeadingContent UseHeadingContentConfiguration | null

Enforce that heading elements (h1, h2, etc.) have content and that the content is accessible to screen readers. Accessible means that it is not hidden using the aria-hidden prop.

Any of: UseHeadingContentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseHeadingContentOptions, null null
useHtmlLang UseHtmlLangConfiguration | null

Enforce that html element has lang attribute.

Any of: UseHtmlLangConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseHtmlLangOptions, null null
useIframeTitle UseIframeTitleConfiguration | null

Enforces the usage of the attribute title for the element iframe.

Any of: UseIframeTitleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseIframeTitleOptions, null null
useKeyWithClickEvents UseKeyWithClickEventsConfiguration | null

Enforce onClick is accompanied by at least one of the following: onKeyUp, onKeyDown, onKeyPress.

Any of: UseKeyWithClickEventsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseKeyWithClickEventsOptions, null null
useKeyWithMouseEvents UseKeyWithMouseEventsConfiguration | null

Enforce onMouseOver / onMouseOut are accompanied by onFocus / onBlur.

Any of: UseKeyWithMouseEventsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseKeyWithMouseEventsOptions, null null
useMediaCaption UseMediaCaptionConfiguration | null

Enforces that audio and video elements must have a track for captions.

Any of: UseMediaCaptionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseMediaCaptionOptions, null null
useSemanticElements UseSemanticElementsConfiguration | null

It detects the use of role attributes in JSX elements and suggests using semantic elements instead.

Any of: UseSemanticElementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSemanticElementsOptions, null null
useValidAnchor UseValidAnchorConfiguration | null

Enforce that all anchors are valid, and they are navigable elements.

Any of: UseValidAnchorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidAnchorOptions, null null
useValidAriaProps UseValidAriaPropsConfiguration | null

Ensures that ARIA properties aria-* are all valid.

Any of: UseValidAriaPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidAriaPropsOptions, null null
useValidAriaRole UseValidAriaRoleConfiguration | null

Elements with ARIA roles must use a valid, non-abstract ARIA role.

Any of: UseValidAriaRoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidAriaRoleOptions, null null
useValidAriaValues UseValidAriaValuesConfiguration | null

Enforce that ARIA state and property values are valid.

Any of: UseValidAriaValuesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidAriaValuesOptions, null null
useValidAutocomplete UseValidAutocompleteConfiguration | null

Use valid values for the autocomplete attribute on input elements.

Any of: UseValidAutocompleteConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidAutocompleteOptions, null null
useValidLang UseValidLangConfiguration | null

Ensure that the attribute passed to the lang attribute is a correct ISO language and/or country.

Any of: UseValidLangConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidLangOptions, null null
Accessibility string
Actions object
recommended boolean | null

It enables the assist actions recommended by Biome. true by default.

source Source | null
Any of: Source object, null null
ArrowParentheses string
AssistConfiguration object
actions Actions | null

Whether Biome should fail in CLI if the assist were not applied to the code.

Any of: Actions object, null null
enabled Bool | null

Whether Biome should enable assist via LSP and CLI.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
includes array | null

A list of glob patterns. Biome will include files/folders that will match these patterns.

AttributePosition string
Bool boolean
BracketSameLine boolean

Put the > of a multi-line HTML or JSX element at the end of the last line instead of being alone on the next line (does not apply to self closing elements).

BracketSpacing boolean
Complexity object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAdjacentSpacesInRegex NoAdjacentSpacesInRegexConfiguration | null

Disallow unclear usage of consecutive space characters in regular expression literals

Any of: NoAdjacentSpacesInRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAdjacentSpacesInRegexOptions, null null
noArguments NoArgumentsConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of arguments.

Any of: NoArgumentsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoArgumentsOptions, null null
noBannedTypes NoBannedTypesConfiguration | null

Disallow primitive type aliases and misleading types.

Any of: NoBannedTypesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBannedTypesOptions, null null
noCommaOperator NoCommaOperatorConfiguration | null

Disallow comma operator.

Any of: NoCommaOperatorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoCommaOperatorOptions, null null
noEmptyTypeParameters NoEmptyTypeParametersConfiguration | null

Disallow empty type parameters in type aliases and interfaces.

Any of: NoEmptyTypeParametersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyTypeParametersOptions, null null
noExcessiveCognitiveComplexity NoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityConfiguration | null

Disallow functions that exceed a given Cognitive Complexity score.

Any of: NoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveCognitiveComplexityOptions, null null
noExcessiveLinesPerFunction NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionConfiguration | null

Restrict the number of lines of code in a function.

Any of: NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions, null null
noExcessiveNestedTestSuites NoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesConfiguration | null

This rule enforces a maximum depth to nested describe() in test files.

Any of: NoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesOptions, null null
noExtraBooleanCast NoExtraBooleanCastConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary boolean casts

Any of: NoExtraBooleanCastConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExtraBooleanCastOptions, null null
noFlatMapIdentity NoFlatMapIdentityConfiguration | null

Disallow to use unnecessary callback on flatMap.

Any of: NoFlatMapIdentityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFlatMapIdentityOptions, null null
noForEach NoForEachConfiguration | null

Prefer for...of statement instead of Array.forEach.

Any of: NoForEachConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoForEachOptions, null null
noImplicitCoercions NoImplicitCoercionsConfiguration | null

Disallow shorthand type conversions.

Any of: NoImplicitCoercionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImplicitCoercionsOptions, null null
noImportantStyles NoImportantStylesConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of the !important style.

Any of: NoImportantStylesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportantStylesOptions, null null
noStaticOnlyClass NoStaticOnlyClassConfiguration | null

This rule reports when a class has no non-static members, such as for a class used exclusively as a static namespace.

Any of: NoStaticOnlyClassConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoStaticOnlyClassOptions, null null
noThisInStatic NoThisInStaticConfiguration | null

Disallow this and super in static contexts.

Any of: NoThisInStaticConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoThisInStaticOptions, null null
noUselessCatch NoUselessCatchConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary catch clauses.

Any of: NoUselessCatchConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessCatchOptions, null null
noUselessConstructor NoUselessConstructorConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary constructors.

Any of: NoUselessConstructorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessConstructorOptions, null null
noUselessContinue NoUselessContinueConfiguration | null

Avoid using unnecessary continue.

Any of: NoUselessContinueConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessContinueOptions, null null
noUselessEmptyExport NoUselessEmptyExportConfiguration | null

Disallow empty exports that don't change anything in a module file.

Any of: NoUselessEmptyExportConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessEmptyExportOptions, null null
noUselessEscapeInRegex NoUselessEscapeInRegexConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary escape sequence in regular expression literals.

Any of: NoUselessEscapeInRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessEscapeInRegexOptions, null null
noUselessFragments NoUselessFragmentsConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary fragments

Any of: NoUselessFragmentsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessFragmentsOptions, null null
noUselessLabel NoUselessLabelConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary labels.

Any of: NoUselessLabelConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessLabelOptions, null null
noUselessLoneBlockStatements NoUselessLoneBlockStatementsConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary nested block statements.

Any of: NoUselessLoneBlockStatementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessLoneBlockStatementsOptions, null null
noUselessRename NoUselessRenameConfiguration | null

Disallow renaming import, export, and destructured assignments to the same name.

Any of: NoUselessRenameConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessRenameOptions, null null
noUselessStringConcat NoUselessStringConcatConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary concatenation of string or template literals.

Any of: NoUselessStringConcatConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessStringConcatOptions, null null
noUselessStringRaw NoUselessStringRawConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary String.raw function in template string literals without any escape sequence.

Any of: NoUselessStringRawConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessStringRawOptions, null null
noUselessSwitchCase NoUselessSwitchCaseConfiguration | null

Disallow useless case in switch statements.

Any of: NoUselessSwitchCaseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessSwitchCaseOptions, null null
noUselessTernary NoUselessTernaryConfiguration | null

Disallow ternary operators when simpler alternatives exist.

Any of: NoUselessTernaryConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessTernaryOptions, null null
noUselessThisAlias NoUselessThisAliasConfiguration | null

Disallow useless this aliasing.

Any of: NoUselessThisAliasConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessThisAliasOptions, null null
noUselessTypeConstraint NoUselessTypeConstraintConfiguration | null

Disallow using any or unknown as type constraint.

Any of: NoUselessTypeConstraintConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessTypeConstraintOptions, null null
noUselessUndefinedInitialization NoUselessUndefinedInitializationConfiguration | null

Disallow initializing variables to undefined.

Any of: NoUselessUndefinedInitializationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessUndefinedInitializationOptions, null null
noVoid NoVoidConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of void operators, which is not a familiar operator.

Any of: NoVoidConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVoidOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useArrowFunction UseArrowFunctionConfiguration | null

Use arrow functions over function expressions.

Any of: UseArrowFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseArrowFunctionOptions, null null
useDateNow UseDateNowConfiguration | null

Use Date.now() to get the number of milliseconds since the Unix Epoch.

Any of: UseDateNowConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDateNowOptions, null null
useFlatMap UseFlatMapConfiguration | null

Promotes the use of .flatMap() when map().flat() are used together.

Any of: UseFlatMapConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseFlatMapOptions, null null
useIndexOf UseIndexOfConfiguration | null

Prefer Array#{indexOf,lastIndexOf}() over Array#{findIndex,findLastIndex}() when looking for the index of an item.

Any of: UseIndexOfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseIndexOfOptions, null null
useLiteralKeys UseLiteralKeysConfiguration | null

Enforce the usage of a literal access to properties over computed property access.

Any of: UseLiteralKeysConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseLiteralKeysOptions, null null
useNumericLiterals UseNumericLiteralsConfiguration | null

Disallow parseInt() and Number.parseInt() in favor of binary, octal, and hexadecimal literals

Any of: UseNumericLiteralsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNumericLiteralsOptions, null null
useOptionalChain UseOptionalChainConfiguration | null

Enforce using concise optional chain instead of chained logical expressions.

Any of: UseOptionalChainConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseOptionalChainOptions, null null
useRegexLiterals UseRegexLiteralsConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of the regular expression literals instead of the RegExp constructor if possible.

Any of: UseRegexLiteralsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseRegexLiteralsOptions, null null
useSimpleNumberKeys UseSimpleNumberKeysConfiguration | null

Disallow number literal object member names which are not base 10 or use underscore as separator.

Any of: UseSimpleNumberKeysConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSimpleNumberKeysOptions, null null
useSimplifiedLogicExpression UseSimplifiedLogicExpressionConfiguration | null

Discard redundant terms from logical expressions.

Any of: UseSimplifiedLogicExpressionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSimplifiedLogicExpressionOptions, null null
useWhile UseWhileConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of while loops instead of for loops when the initializer and update expressions are not needed.

Any of: UseWhileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseWhileOptions, null null
ConsistentArrayType string | string
ConsistentTypeDefinition string | string
Convention object
formats

String cases to enforce

All of: Formats Format[]
match Regex | null

Regular expression to enforce

Any of: Regex string, null null
selector

Declarations concerned by this convention

All of: Selector object
Correctness object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noChildrenProp NoChildrenPropConfiguration | null

Prevent passing of children as props.

Any of: NoChildrenPropConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoChildrenPropOptions, null null
noConstAssign NoConstAssignConfiguration | null

Prevents from having const variables being re-assigned.

Any of: NoConstAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstAssignOptions, null null
noConstantCondition NoConstantConditionConfiguration | null

Disallow constant expressions in conditions

Any of: NoConstantConditionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstantConditionOptions, null null
noConstantMathMinMaxClamp NoConstantMathMinMaxClampConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of Math.min and Math.max to clamp a value where the result itself is constant.

Any of: NoConstantMathMinMaxClampConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstantMathMinMaxClampOptions, null null
noConstructorReturn NoConstructorReturnConfiguration | null

Disallow returning a value from a constructor.

Any of: NoConstructorReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstructorReturnOptions, null null
noEmptyCharacterClassInRegex NoEmptyCharacterClassInRegexConfiguration | null

Disallow empty character classes in regular expression literals.

Any of: NoEmptyCharacterClassInRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyCharacterClassInRegexOptions, null null
noEmptyPattern NoEmptyPatternConfiguration | null

Disallows empty destructuring patterns.

Any of: NoEmptyPatternConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyPatternOptions, null null
noGlobalDirnameFilename NoGlobalDirnameFilenameConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of __dirname and __filename in the global scope.

Any of: NoGlobalDirnameFilenameConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalDirnameFilenameOptions, null null
noGlobalObjectCalls NoGlobalObjectCallsConfiguration | null

Disallow calling global object properties as functions

Any of: NoGlobalObjectCallsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalObjectCallsOptions, null null
noInnerDeclarations NoInnerDeclarationsConfiguration | null

Disallow function and var declarations that are accessible outside their block.

Any of: NoInnerDeclarationsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInnerDeclarationsOptions, null null
noInvalidBuiltinInstantiation NoInvalidBuiltinInstantiationConfiguration | null

Ensure that builtins are correctly instantiated.

Any of: NoInvalidBuiltinInstantiationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidBuiltinInstantiationOptions, null null
noInvalidConstructorSuper NoInvalidConstructorSuperConfiguration | null

Prevents the incorrect use of super() inside classes. It also checks whether a call super() is missing from classes that extends other constructors.

Any of: NoInvalidConstructorSuperConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidConstructorSuperOptions, null null
noInvalidDirectionInLinearGradient NoInvalidDirectionInLinearGradientConfiguration | null

Disallow non-standard direction values for linear gradient functions.

Any of: NoInvalidDirectionInLinearGradientConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidDirectionInLinearGradientOptions, null null
noInvalidGridAreas NoInvalidGridAreasConfiguration | null

Disallows invalid named grid areas in CSS Grid Layouts.

Any of: NoInvalidGridAreasConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidGridAreasOptions, null null
noInvalidPositionAtImportRule NoInvalidPositionAtImportRuleConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of @import at-rules in invalid positions.

Any of: NoInvalidPositionAtImportRuleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidPositionAtImportRuleOptions, null null
noInvalidUseBeforeDeclaration NoInvalidUseBeforeDeclarationConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of variables and function parameters before their declaration

Any of: NoInvalidUseBeforeDeclarationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInvalidUseBeforeDeclarationOptions, null null
noMissingVarFunction NoMissingVarFunctionConfiguration | null

Disallow missing var function for css variables.

Any of: NoMissingVarFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMissingVarFunctionOptions, null null
noNestedComponentDefinitions NoNestedComponentDefinitionsConfiguration | null

Disallows defining React components inside other components.

Any of: NoNestedComponentDefinitionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNestedComponentDefinitionsOptions, null null
noNodejsModules NoNodejsModulesConfiguration | null

Forbid the use of Node.js builtin modules.

Any of: NoNodejsModulesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNodejsModulesOptions, null null
noNonoctalDecimalEscape NoNonoctalDecimalEscapeConfiguration | null

Disallow \8 and \9 escape sequences in string literals.

Any of: NoNonoctalDecimalEscapeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNonoctalDecimalEscapeOptions, null null
noPrecisionLoss NoPrecisionLossConfiguration | null

Disallow literal numbers that lose precision

Any of: NoPrecisionLossConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPrecisionLossOptions, null null
noPrivateImports NoPrivateImportsConfiguration | null

Restrict imports of private exports.

Any of: NoPrivateImportsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPrivateImportsOptions, null null
noProcessGlobal NoProcessGlobalConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of process global.

Any of: NoProcessGlobalConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoProcessGlobalOptions, null null
noReactPropAssignments NoReactPropAssignmentsConfiguration | null

Disallow assigning to React component props.

Any of: NoReactPropAssignmentsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoReactPropAssignmentsOptions, null null
noRenderReturnValue NoRenderReturnValueConfiguration | null

Prevent the usage of the return value of React.render.

Any of: NoRenderReturnValueConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRenderReturnValueOptions, null null
noRestrictedElements NoRestrictedElementsConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of configured elements.

Any of: NoRestrictedElementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRestrictedElementsOptions, null null
noSelfAssign NoSelfAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow assignments where both sides are exactly the same.

Any of: NoSelfAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSelfAssignOptions, null null
noSetterReturn NoSetterReturnConfiguration | null

Disallow returning a value from a setter

Any of: NoSetterReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSetterReturnOptions, null null
noSolidDestructuredProps NoSolidDestructuredPropsConfiguration | null

Disallow destructuring props inside JSX components in Solid projects.

Any of: NoSolidDestructuredPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSolidDestructuredPropsOptions, null null
noStringCaseMismatch NoStringCaseMismatchConfiguration | null

Disallow comparison of expressions modifying the string case with non-compliant value.

Any of: NoStringCaseMismatchConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoStringCaseMismatchOptions, null null
noSwitchDeclarations NoSwitchDeclarationsConfiguration | null

Disallow lexical declarations in switch clauses.

Any of: NoSwitchDeclarationsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSwitchDeclarationsOptions, null null
noUndeclaredDependencies NoUndeclaredDependenciesConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of dependencies that aren't specified in the package.json.

Any of: NoUndeclaredDependenciesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredDependenciesOptions, null null
noUndeclaredVariables NoUndeclaredVariablesConfiguration | null

Prevents the usage of variables that haven't been declared inside the document.

Any of: NoUndeclaredVariablesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUndeclaredVariablesOptions, null null
noUnknownFunction NoUnknownFunctionConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown CSS value functions.

Any of: NoUnknownFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownFunctionOptions, null null
noUnknownMediaFeatureName NoUnknownMediaFeatureNameConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown media feature names.

Any of: NoUnknownMediaFeatureNameConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownMediaFeatureNameOptions, null null
noUnknownProperty NoUnknownPropertyConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown properties.

Any of: NoUnknownPropertyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownPropertyOptions, null null
noUnknownPseudoClass NoUnknownPseudoClassConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown pseudo-class selectors.

Any of: NoUnknownPseudoClassConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownPseudoClassOptions, null null
noUnknownPseudoElement NoUnknownPseudoElementConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown pseudo-element selectors.

Any of: NoUnknownPseudoElementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownPseudoElementOptions, null null
noUnknownTypeSelector NoUnknownTypeSelectorConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown type selectors.

Any of: NoUnknownTypeSelectorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownTypeSelectorOptions, null null
noUnknownUnit NoUnknownUnitConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown CSS units.

Any of: NoUnknownUnitConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownUnitOptions, null null
noUnmatchableAnbSelector NoUnmatchableAnbSelectorConfiguration | null

Disallow unmatchable An+B selectors.

Any of: NoUnmatchableAnbSelectorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnmatchableAnbSelectorOptions, null null
noUnreachable NoUnreachableConfiguration | null

Disallow unreachable code

Any of: NoUnreachableConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnreachableOptions, null null
noUnreachableSuper NoUnreachableSuperConfiguration | null

Ensures the super() constructor is called exactly once on every code path in a class constructor before this is accessed if the class has a superclass

Any of: NoUnreachableSuperConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnreachableSuperOptions, null null
noUnsafeFinally NoUnsafeFinallyConfiguration | null

Disallow control flow statements in finally blocks.

Any of: NoUnsafeFinallyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnsafeFinallyOptions, null null
noUnsafeOptionalChaining NoUnsafeOptionalChainingConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of optional chaining in contexts where the undefined value is not allowed.

Any of: NoUnsafeOptionalChainingConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnsafeOptionalChainingOptions, null null
noUnusedFunctionParameters NoUnusedFunctionParametersConfiguration | null

Disallow unused function parameters.

Any of: NoUnusedFunctionParametersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedFunctionParametersOptions, null null
noUnusedImports NoUnusedImportsConfiguration | null

Disallow unused imports.

Any of: NoUnusedImportsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedImportsOptions, null null
noUnusedLabels NoUnusedLabelsConfiguration | null

Disallow unused labels.

Any of: NoUnusedLabelsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedLabelsOptions, null null
noUnusedPrivateClassMembers NoUnusedPrivateClassMembersConfiguration | null

Disallow unused private class members

Any of: NoUnusedPrivateClassMembersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedPrivateClassMembersOptions, null null
noUnusedVariables NoUnusedVariablesConfiguration | null

Disallow unused variables.

Any of: NoUnusedVariablesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedVariablesOptions, null null
noVoidElementsWithChildren NoVoidElementsWithChildrenConfiguration | null

This rules prevents void elements (AKA self-closing elements) from having children.

Any of: NoVoidElementsWithChildrenConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVoidElementsWithChildrenOptions, null null
noVoidTypeReturn NoVoidTypeReturnConfiguration | null

Disallow returning a value from a function with the return type 'void'

Any of: NoVoidTypeReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVoidTypeReturnOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useExhaustiveDependencies UseExhaustiveDependenciesConfiguration | null

Enforce all dependencies are correctly specified in a React hook.

Any of: UseExhaustiveDependenciesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExhaustiveDependenciesOptions, null null
useGraphqlNamedOperations UseGraphqlNamedOperationsConfiguration | null

Enforce specifying the name of GraphQL operations.

Any of: UseGraphqlNamedOperationsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGraphqlNamedOperationsOptions, null null
useHookAtTopLevel UseHookAtTopLevelConfiguration | null

Enforce that all React hooks are being called from the Top Level component functions.

Any of: UseHookAtTopLevelConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseHookAtTopLevelOptions, null null
useImportExtensions UseImportExtensionsConfiguration | null

Enforce file extensions for relative imports.

Any of: UseImportExtensionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseImportExtensionsOptions, null null
useIsNan UseIsNanConfiguration | null

Require calls to isNaN() when checking for NaN.

Any of: UseIsNanConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseIsNanOptions, null null
useJsonImportAttributes UseJsonImportAttributesConfiguration | null

Enforces the use of with { type: "json" } for JSON module imports.

Any of: UseJsonImportAttributesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseJsonImportAttributesOptions, null null
useJsxKeyInIterable UseJsxKeyInIterableConfiguration | null

Disallow missing key props in iterators/collection literals.

Any of: UseJsxKeyInIterableConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseJsxKeyInIterableOptions, null null
useParseIntRadix UseParseIntRadixConfiguration | null

Enforce the consistent use of the radix argument when using parseInt().

Any of: UseParseIntRadixConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseParseIntRadixOptions, null null
useSingleJsDocAsterisk UseSingleJsDocAsteriskConfiguration | null

Enforce JSDoc comment lines to start with a single asterisk, except for the first one.

Any of: UseSingleJsDocAsteriskConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSingleJsDocAsteriskOptions, null null
useUniqueElementIds UseUniqueElementIdsConfiguration | null

Prevent the usage of static string literal id attribute on elements.

Any of: UseUniqueElementIdsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseUniqueElementIdsOptions, null null
useValidForDirection UseValidForDirectionConfiguration | null

Enforce "for" loop update clause moving the counter in the right direction.

Any of: UseValidForDirectionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidForDirectionOptions, null null
useValidTypeof UseValidTypeofConfiguration | null

This rule checks that the result of a typeof expression is compared to a valid value.

Any of: UseValidTypeofConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseValidTypeofOptions, null null
useYield UseYieldConfiguration | null

Require generator functions to contain yield.

Any of: UseYieldConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseYieldOptions, null null
CssAssistConfiguration object

Options that changes how the CSS assist behaves

enabled Bool | null

Control the assist for CSS files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
CssConfiguration object

Options applied to CSS files

assist CssAssistConfiguration | null

CSS assist options

Default: null
Any of: CssAssistConfiguration object, null null
formatter CssFormatterConfiguration | null

CSS formatter options

Default: null
Any of: CssFormatterConfiguration object, null null
globals array | null

CSS globals

uniqueItems=true
linter CssLinterConfiguration | null

CSS linter options

Default: null
Any of: CssLinterConfiguration object, null null
parser CssParserConfiguration | null

CSS parsing options

Default: null
Any of: CssParserConfiguration object, null null
CssFormatterConfiguration object

Options that changes how the CSS formatter behaves

enabled Bool | null

Control the formatter for CSS (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style applied to CSS (and its super languages) files.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation applied to CSS (and its super languages) files. Default to 2.

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending applied to CSS (and its super languages) files.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line applied to CSS (and its super languages) files. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
quoteStyle QuoteStyle | null

The type of quotes used in CSS code. Defaults to double.

Any of: QuoteStyle string, null null
CssLinterConfiguration object

Options that changes how the CSS linter behaves

enabled Bool | null

Control the linter for CSS files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
CssParserConfiguration object

Options that changes how the CSS parser behaves

allowWrongLineComments Bool | null

Allow comments to appear on incorrect lines in .css files

Default: null
Any of: Bool boolean, null null
cssModules Bool | null

Enables parsing of CSS Modules specific features.

Default: null
Any of: Bool boolean, null null
CustomRestrictedElements object
CustomRestrictedType string | CustomRestrictedTypeOptions
CustomRestrictedTypeOptions object
message string
Default: ""
use string | null
Default: null
DependencyAvailability boolean | string[]
Expand string | string | string
Extends string[] | string
FilenameCase string | string | string | string | string

Supported cases for file names.

FilenameCases FilenameCase[]
FilesConfiguration object

The configuration of the filesystem

experimentalScannerIgnores array | null

Set of file and folder names that should be unconditionally ignored by Biome's scanner.

Biome maintains an internal list of default ignore entries, which is based on user feedback and which may change in any release. This setting allows overriding this internal list completely.

This is considered an advanced feature that users should not need to tweak themselves, but they can as a last resort. This setting can only be configured in root configurations, and is ignored in nested configs.

Entries must be file or folder names. Specific paths and globs are not supported.

Examples where this may be useful:

```jsonc { "files": { "experimentalScannerIgnores": [ // You almost certainly don't want to scan your .git // folder, which is why it's already ignored by default: ".git",

// But the scanner does scan node_modules by default. If // you really don't want this, you can ignore it like // this: "node_modules",

// But it's probably better to ignore a specific dependency. // For instance, one that happens to be particularly slow to // scan: "RedisCommander.d.ts", ], } } ```

Please be aware that rules relying on the module graph or type inference information may be negatively affected if dependencies of your project aren't (fully) scanned.

ignoreUnknown Bool | null

Tells Biome to not emit diagnostics when handling files that doesn't know

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
includes array | null

A list of glob patterns. Biome will handle only those files/folders that will match these patterns.

maxSize MaxSize | null

The maximum allowed size for source code files in bytes. Files above this limit will be ignored for performance reasons. Defaults to 1 MiB

Any of: MaxSize integer, null null
FixKind string | string | string

Used to identify the kind of code action emitted by a rule

Format string

Supported cases.

Formats Format[]
FormatterConfiguration object

Generic options applied to all files

attributePosition AttributePosition | null

The attribute position style in HTML-ish languages. Defaults to auto.

Any of: AttributePosition string, null null
bracketSameLine BracketSameLine | null

Put the > of a multi-line HTML or JSX element at the end of the last line instead of being alone on the next line (does not apply to self closing elements).

Any of: BracketSameLine boolean, null null
bracketSpacing BracketSpacing | null

Whether to insert spaces around brackets in object literals. Defaults to true.

Any of: BracketSpacing boolean, null null
enabled Bool | null
Any of: Bool boolean, null null
expand Expand | null

Whether to expand arrays and objects on multiple lines. When set to auto, object literals are formatted on multiple lines if the first property has a newline, and array literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When set to always, these literals are formatted on multiple lines, regardless of length of the list. When set to never, these literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When formatting package.json, Biome will use always unless configured otherwise. Defaults to "auto".

Any of: Expand string | string | string, null null
formatWithErrors Bool | null

Stores whether formatting should be allowed to proceed if a given file has syntax errors

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
includes array | null

A list of glob patterns. The formatter will include files/folders that will match these patterns.

indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation, 2 by default

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
useEditorconfig Bool | null

Use any .editorconfig files to configure the formatter. Configuration in biome.json will override .editorconfig configuration.

Default: true.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
Glob string

Control the formatter for GraphQL files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
GroupMatcher ImportMatcher | SourceMatcher
GroupPlainConfiguration string | string | string | string | string
Hook object
closureIndex integer | null

The "position" of the closure function, starting from zero.

For example, for React's useEffect() hook, the closure index is 0.

Default: null
format=uint8min=0
dependenciesIndex integer | null

The "position" of the array of dependencies, starting from zero.

For example, for React's useEffect() hook, the dependencies index is 1.

Default: null
format=uint8min=0
name string

The name of the hook.

Default: ""
stableResult StableHookResult | null

Whether the result of the hook is stable.

Set to true to mark the identity of the hook's return value as stable, or use a number/an array of numbers to mark the "positions" in the return array as stable.

For example, for React's useRef() hook the value would be true, while for useState() it would be [1].

Default: null
Any of: StableHookResult boolean | integer[] | string[], null null
HtmlConfiguration object

Options applied to HTML files

formatter HtmlFormatterConfiguration | null

HTML formatter options

Any of: HtmlFormatterConfiguration object, null null
parser HtmlParserConfiguration | null

HTML parsing options

Any of: HtmlParserConfiguration object, null null
HtmlFormatterConfiguration object

Options that changes how the HTML formatter behaves

attributePosition AttributePosition | null

The attribute position style in HTML elements. Defaults to auto.

Any of: AttributePosition string, null null
bracketSameLine BracketSameLine | null

Whether to hug the closing bracket of multiline HTML tags to the end of the last line, rather than being alone on the following line. Defaults to false.

Any of: BracketSameLine boolean, null null
enabled Bool | null

Control the formatter for HTML (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
indentScriptAndStyle IndentScriptAndStyle | null

Whether to indent the <script> and <style> tags for HTML (and its super languages). Defaults to false.

Any of: IndentScriptAndStyle boolean, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style applied to HTML (and its super languages) files.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation applied to HTML (and its super languages) files. Default to 2.

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending applied to HTML (and its super languages) files.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line applied to HTML (and its super languages) files. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
selfCloseVoidElements SelfCloseVoidElements | null

Whether void elements should be self-closed. Defaults to never.

Any of: SelfCloseVoidElements string | string, null null
whitespaceSensitivity WhitespaceSensitivity | null

Whether to account for whitespace sensitivity when formatting HTML (and its super languages). Defaults to "css".

Any of: WhitespaceSensitivity string | string | string, null null
HtmlParserConfiguration object

Options that changes how the HTML parser behaves

interpolation Bool | null

Enables the parsing of double text expressions such as {{ expression }} inside .html files

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
ImportGroup null | GroupMatcher | GroupMatcher[]
ImportGroups ImportGroup[]
ImportMatcher object
source SourcesMatcher | null
Any of: SourcesMatcher SourceMatcher | SourceMatcher[], null null
type boolean | null
ImportSourceGlob

Glob to match against import sources.

IndentScriptAndStyle boolean

Whether to indent the content of <script> and <style> tags for HTML-ish templating languages (Vue, Svelte, etc.).

When true, the content of <script> and <style> tags will be indented one level.

IndentStyle string | string
IndentWidth integer

Assist options specific to the JavaScript assist

enabled Bool | null

Control the assist for JavaScript (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null

A set of options applied to the JavaScript files

assist JsAssistConfiguration | null

Assist options

formatter JsFormatterConfiguration | null

Formatting options

Any of: JsFormatterConfiguration object, null null

A list of global bindings that should be ignored by the analyzers

If defined here, they should not emit diagnostics.

uniqueItems=true

Indicates the type of runtime or transformation used for interpreting JSX.

Any of: JsxRuntime string | string, null null

Linter options

Any of: JsLinterConfiguration object, null null

Parsing options

Any of: JsParserConfiguration object, null null
JsFormatterConfiguration object

Formatting options specific to the JavaScript files

arrowParentheses ArrowParentheses | null

Whether to add non-necessary parentheses to arrow functions. Defaults to "always".

Any of: ArrowParentheses string, null null
attributePosition AttributePosition | null

The attribute position style in JSX elements. Defaults to auto.

Any of: AttributePosition string, null null
bracketSameLine BracketSameLine | null

Whether to hug the closing bracket of multiline HTML/JSX tags to the end of the last line, rather than being alone on the following line. Defaults to false.

Any of: BracketSameLine boolean, null null
bracketSpacing BracketSpacing | null

Whether to insert spaces around brackets in object literals. Defaults to true.

Any of: BracketSpacing boolean, null null
enabled Bool | null

Control the formatter for JavaScript (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
expand Expand | null

Whether to expand arrays and objects on multiple lines. When set to auto, object literals are formatted on multiple lines if the first property has a newline, and array literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When set to always, these literals are formatted on multiple lines, regardless of length of the list. When set to never, these literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When formatting package.json, Biome will use always unless configured otherwise. Defaults to "auto".

Any of: Expand string | string | string, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style applied to JavaScript (and its super languages) files.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation applied to JavaScript (and its super languages) files. Default to 2.

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
jsxQuoteStyle QuoteStyle | null

The type of quotes used in JSX. Defaults to double.

Any of: QuoteStyle string, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending applied to JavaScript (and its super languages) files.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line applied to JavaScript (and its super languages) files. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
operatorLinebreak OperatorLinebreak | null

When breaking binary expressions into multiple lines, whether to break them before or after the binary operator. Defaults to "after".

Any of: OperatorLinebreak string | string, null null
quoteProperties QuoteProperties | null

When properties in objects are quoted. Defaults to asNeeded.

Any of: QuoteProperties string, null null
quoteStyle QuoteStyle | null

The type of quotes used in JavaScript code. Defaults to double.

Any of: QuoteStyle string, null null
semicolons Semicolons | null

Whether the formatter prints semicolons for all statements or only in for statements where it is necessary because of ASI.

Any of: Semicolons string, null null
trailingCommas TrailingCommas | null

Print trailing commas wherever possible in multi-line comma-separated syntactic structures. Defaults to "all".

Any of: TrailingCommas string | string | string, null null
JsLinterConfiguration object

Linter options specific to the JavaScript linter

enabled Bool | null

Control the linter for JavaScript (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
JsParserConfiguration object

Options that changes how the JavaScript parser behaves

gritMetavariables Bool | null

Enables parsing of Grit metavariables. Defaults to false.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
jsxEverywhere Bool | null

When enabled, files like .js/.mjs/.cjs may contain JSX syntax.

Defaults to true.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
unsafeParameterDecoratorsEnabled Bool | null

It enables the experimental and unsafe parsing of parameter decorators

These decorators belong to an old proposal, and they are subject to change.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
JsonAssistConfiguration object

Linter options specific to the JSON linter

enabled Bool | null

Control the assist for JSON (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null

enabled Bool | null

Control the formatter for JSON (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
expand Expand | null

Whether to expand arrays and objects on multiple lines. When set to auto, object literals are formatted on multiple lines if the first property has a newline, and array literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When set to always, these literals are formatted on multiple lines, regardless of length of the list. When set to never, these literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When formatting package.json, Biome will use always unless configured otherwise. Defaults to "auto".

Any of: Expand string | string | string, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style applied to JSON (and its super languages) files.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null

What's the max width of a line applied to JSON (and its super languages) files. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
trailingCommas TrailingCommas2 | null

Print trailing commas wherever possible in multi-line comma-separated syntactic structures. Defaults to "none".

Any of: TrailingCommas2 string | string, null null

Linter options specific to the JSON linter

enabled Bool | null

Control the linter for JSON (and its super languages) files.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
JsonParserConfiguration object

Options that changes how the JSON parser behaves

allowComments Bool | null

Allow parsing comments in .json files

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
allowTrailingCommas Bool | null

Allow parsing trailing commas in .json files

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
JsxRuntime string | string

Indicates the type of runtime or transformation used for interpreting JSX.

Kind string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string
LineEnding string | string | string
LineWidth integer

Validated value for the line_width formatter options

The allowed range of values is 1..=320

LinterConfiguration object
domains RuleDomains | null

An object where the keys are the names of the domains, and the values are all, recommended, or none.

Any of: RuleDomains object, null null
enabled Bool | null

if false, it disables the feature and the linter won't be executed. true by default

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
includes array | null

A list of glob patterns. The analyzer will handle only those files/folders that will match these patterns.

rules Rules | null

List of rules

Any of: Rules object, null null
MaxSize integer
Modifiers RestrictedModifier[]
NegatablePredefinedSourceMatcher string

allow string[]

Allows a list of bitwise operators to be used as exceptions.

NoBlankTargetConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBlankTargetOptions
NoBlankTargetOptions object

List of domains where target="_blank" is allowed without rel="noopener".

allowNoReferrer boolean

Whether noreferrer is allowed in addition to noopener.

Default: true

NoDoubleEqualsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDoubleEqualsOptions
NoDoubleEqualsOptions object
ignoreNull boolean

If true, an exception is made when comparing with null, as it's often relied on to check both for null or undefined.

If false, no such exception will be made.

maxAllowedComplexity integer

The maximum complexity score that we allow. Anything higher is considered excessive.

Default: 15
format=uint8min=1
NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions
NoExcessiveLinesPerFunctionOptions object
maxLines integer

The maximum number of lines allowed in a function body.

Default: 50
format=uint8min=1
skipBlankLines boolean

When this options is set to true, blank lines in the function body are not counted towards the maximum line limit.

Default: false
skipIifes boolean

When this option is set to true, Immediately Invoked Function Expressions (IIFEs) are not checked for the maximum line limit.

Default: false

NoExcessiveNestedTestSuitesOptions object

NoImportCyclesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportCyclesOptions
NoImportCyclesOptions object
ignoreTypes boolean

Ignores type-only imports when finding an import cycle. A type-only import (import type) will be removed by the compiler, so it cuts an import cycle at runtime. Note that named type imports (import { type Foo }) aren't considered as type-only because it's not removed by the compiler if the verbatimModuleSyntax option is enabled. Enabled by default.

Default: true
NoImportantInKeyframeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportantInKeyframeOptions
NoImportantInKeyframeOptions object

devDependencies

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when devDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Default: true
All of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[]
optionalDependencies

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when optionalDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Default: true
All of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[]
peerDependencies

If set to false, then the rule will show an error when peerDependencies are imported. Defaults to true.

Default: true
All of: DependencyAvailability boolean | string[]

NoUndeclaredVariablesOptions object
checkTypes boolean

Check undeclared types.

Default: false

NoYodaExpressionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoYodaExpressionOptions
NoYodaExpressionOptions object
NormalizedGlob

Normalized Biome glob pattern that strips ./ from the pattern.

Nursery object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noFloatingPromises NoFloatingPromisesConfiguration | null

Require Promise-like statements to be handled appropriately.

Any of: NoFloatingPromisesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFloatingPromisesOptions, null null
noImportCycles NoImportCyclesConfiguration | null

Prevent import cycles.

Any of: NoImportCyclesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportCyclesOptions, null null
noMisusedPromises NoMisusedPromisesConfiguration | null

Disallow Promises to be used in places where they are almost certainly a mistake.

Any of: NoMisusedPromisesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisusedPromisesOptions, null null
noNextAsyncClientComponent NoNextAsyncClientComponentConfiguration | null

Prevent client components from being async functions.

Any of: NoNextAsyncClientComponentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNextAsyncClientComponentOptions, null null
noNonNullAssertedOptionalChain NoNonNullAssertedOptionalChainConfiguration | null

Disallow non-null assertions after optional chaining expressions.

Any of: NoNonNullAssertedOptionalChainConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNonNullAssertedOptionalChainOptions, null null
noQwikUseVisibleTask NoQwikUseVisibleTaskConfiguration | null

Disallow useVisibleTask$() functions in Qwik components.

Any of: NoQwikUseVisibleTaskConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoQwikUseVisibleTaskOptions, null null
noSecrets NoSecretsConfiguration | null

Disallow usage of sensitive data such as API keys and tokens.

Any of: NoSecretsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSecretsOptions, null null
noShadow NoShadowConfiguration | null

Disallow variable declarations from shadowing variables declared in the outer scope.

Any of: NoShadowConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoShadowOptions, null null
noUnnecessaryConditions NoUnnecessaryConditionsConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary type-based conditions that can be statically determined as redundant.

Any of: NoUnnecessaryConditionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnnecessaryConditionsOptions, null null
noUnresolvedImports NoUnresolvedImportsConfiguration | null

Warn when importing non-existing exports.

Any of: NoUnresolvedImportsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnresolvedImportsOptions, null null
noUselessUndefined NoUselessUndefinedConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of useless undefined.

Any of: NoUselessUndefinedConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessUndefinedOptions, null null
noVueDataObjectDeclaration NoVueDataObjectDeclarationConfiguration | null

Enforce that Vue component data options are declared as functions.

Any of: NoVueDataObjectDeclarationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueDataObjectDeclarationOptions, null null
noVueReservedKeys NoVueReservedKeysConfiguration | null

Disallow reserved keys in Vue component data and computed properties.

Any of: NoVueReservedKeysConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueReservedKeysOptions, null null
noVueReservedProps NoVueReservedPropsConfiguration | null

Disallow reserved names to be used as props.

Any of: NoVueReservedPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVueReservedPropsOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useAnchorHref UseAnchorHrefConfiguration | null

Enforces href attribute for <a> elements.

Any of: UseAnchorHrefConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAnchorHrefOptions, null null
useConsistentTypeDefinitions UseConsistentTypeDefinitionsConfiguration | null

Enforce type definitions to consistently use either interface or type.

Any of: UseConsistentTypeDefinitionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentTypeDefinitionsOptions, null null
useExhaustiveSwitchCases UseExhaustiveSwitchCasesConfiguration | null

Require switch-case statements to be exhaustive.

Any of: UseExhaustiveSwitchCasesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExhaustiveSwitchCasesOptions, null null
useExplicitType UseExplicitTypeConfiguration | null

Enforce types in functions, methods, variables, and parameters.

Any of: UseExplicitTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExplicitTypeOptions, null null
useImageSize UseImageSizeConfiguration | null

Enforces that <img> elements have both width and height attributes.

Any of: UseImageSizeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseImageSizeOptions, null null
useMaxParams UseMaxParamsConfiguration | null

Enforce a maximum number of parameters in function definitions.

Any of: UseMaxParamsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseMaxParamsOptions, null null
useQwikClasslist UseQwikClasslistConfiguration | null

Prefer using the class prop as a classlist over the classnames helper.

Any of: UseQwikClasslistConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseQwikClasslistOptions, null null
useReactFunctionComponents UseReactFunctionComponentsConfiguration | null

Enforce that components are defined as functions and never as classes.

Any of: UseReactFunctionComponentsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseReactFunctionComponentsOptions, null null
useSortedClasses UseSortedClassesConfiguration | null

Enforce the sorting of CSS utility classes.

Any of: UseSortedClassesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSortedClassesOptions, null null
ObjectPropertySyntax string | string
OperatorLinebreak string | string
OrganizeImportsOptions object
groups
Default:
[]
All of: ImportGroups ImportGroup[]
identifierOrder
Default: "natural"
All of: SortOrder string
OverrideAssistConfiguration object
actions Actions | null

List of actions

Any of: Actions object, null null
enabled Bool | null

if false, it disables the feature and the assist won't be executed. true by default

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
OverrideFilesConfiguration object
maxSize MaxSize | null

File size limit in bytes

Any of: MaxSize integer, null null
OverrideFormatterConfiguration object
attributePosition AttributePosition | null

The attribute position style.

Any of: AttributePosition string, null null
bracketSameLine BracketSameLine | null

Put the > of a multi-line HTML or JSX element at the end of the last line instead of being alone on the next line (does not apply to self closing elements).

Any of: BracketSameLine boolean, null null
bracketSpacing BracketSpacing | null

Whether to insert spaces around brackets in object literals. Defaults to true.

Any of: BracketSpacing boolean, null null
enabled Bool | null
Any of: Bool boolean, null null
expand Expand | null

Whether to expand arrays and objects on multiple lines. When set to auto, object literals are formatted on multiple lines if the first property has a newline, and array literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When set to always, these literals are formatted on multiple lines, regardless of length of the list. When set to never, these literals are formatted on a single line if it fits in the line. When formatting package.json, Biome will use always unless configured otherwise. Defaults to "auto".

Any of: Expand string | string | string, null null
formatWithErrors Bool | null

Stores whether formatting should be allowed to proceed if a given file has syntax errors

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
indentSize IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation, 2 by default (deprecated, use indent-width)

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
indentStyle IndentStyle | null

The indent style.

Any of: IndentStyle string | string, null null
indentWidth IndentWidth | null

The size of the indentation, 2 by default

Any of: IndentWidth integer, null null
lineEnding LineEnding | null

The type of line ending.

Any of: LineEnding string | string | string, null null
lineWidth LineWidth | null

What's the max width of a line. Defaults to 80.

Any of: LineWidth integer, null null
OverrideGlobs Glob[]
OverrideLinterConfiguration object
domains RuleDomains | null

List of rules

Any of: RuleDomains object, null null
enabled Bool | null

if false, it disables the feature and the linter won't be executed. true by default

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
rules Rules | null

List of rules

Any of: Rules object, null null
OverridePattern object
assist OverrideAssistConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideAssistConfiguration object, null null
css CssConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the CSS language

Any of: CssConfiguration object, null null
files OverrideFilesConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the filesystem

Any of: OverrideFilesConfiguration object, null null
formatter OverrideFormatterConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideFormatterConfiguration object, null null
graphql GraphqlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Graphql language

Any of: GraphqlConfiguration object, null null
grit GritConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GritQL language

Any of: GritConfiguration object, null null
html HtmlConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the GritQL language

Any of: HtmlConfiguration object, null null
includes OverrideGlobs | null

A list of glob patterns. Biome will include files/folders that will match these patterns.

Any of: OverrideGlobs Glob[], null null
javascript JsConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the JavaScript language

Any of: JsConfiguration object, null null
json JsonConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: JsonConfiguration object, null null
linter OverrideLinterConfiguration | null

Specific configuration for the Json language

Any of: OverrideLinterConfiguration object, null null
plugins Plugins | null

Specific configuration for additional plugins

Any of: Plugins PluginConfiguration[], null null
Overrides OverridePattern[]
PathOptions object
allowImportNames string[]

Names of the exported members that allowed to be not be used.

importNames string[]

Names of the exported members that should not be used.

message string

The message to display when this module is imported.

Paths string
PatternOptions object
group SourcesMatcher | null

An array of gitignore-style patterns.

Any of: SourcesMatcher SourceMatcher | SourceMatcher[], null null
importNamePattern Regex | null

A regex pattern for import names to forbid within the matched modules.

Any of: Regex string, null null
invertImportNamePattern boolean

If true, the matched patterns in the importNamePattern will be allowed. Defaults to false.

Default: false
message string | null

A custom message for diagnostics related to this pattern.

Patterns PatternOptions
Performance object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAccumulatingSpread NoAccumulatingSpreadConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of spread (...) syntax on accumulators.

Any of: NoAccumulatingSpreadConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAccumulatingSpreadOptions, null null
noAwaitInLoops NoAwaitInLoopsConfiguration | null

Disallow await inside loops.

Any of: NoAwaitInLoopsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAwaitInLoopsOptions, null null
noBarrelFile NoBarrelFileConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of barrel file.

Any of: NoBarrelFileConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBarrelFileOptions, null null
noDelete NoDeleteConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of the delete operator.

Any of: NoDeleteConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDeleteOptions, null null
noDynamicNamespaceImportAccess NoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessConfiguration | null

Disallow accessing namespace imports dynamically.

Any of: NoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDynamicNamespaceImportAccessOptions, null null
noImgElement NoImgElementConfiguration | null

Prevent usage of <img> element in a Next.js project.

Any of: NoImgElementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImgElementOptions, null null
noNamespaceImport NoNamespaceImportConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of namespace imports.

Any of: NoNamespaceImportConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNamespaceImportOptions, null null
noReExportAll NoReExportAllConfiguration | null

Avoid re-export all.

Any of: NoReExportAllConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoReExportAllOptions, null null
noUnwantedPolyfillio NoUnwantedPolyfillioConfiguration | null

Prevent duplicate polyfills from Polyfill.io.

Any of: NoUnwantedPolyfillioConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnwantedPolyfillioOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useGoogleFontPreconnect UseGoogleFontPreconnectConfiguration | null

Ensure the preconnect attribute is used when using Google Fonts.

Any of: UseGoogleFontPreconnectConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGoogleFontPreconnectOptions, null null
useSolidForComponent UseSolidForComponentConfiguration | null

Enforce using Solid's <For /> component for mapping an array to JSX elements.

Any of: UseSolidForComponentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSolidForComponentOptions, null null
useTopLevelRegex UseTopLevelRegexConfiguration | null

Require regex literals to be declared at the top level.

Any of: UseTopLevelRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseTopLevelRegexOptions, null null
PluginConfiguration string
Plugins PluginConfiguration[]
PropertyAssignmentMode string | string

Specifies whether property assignments on function parameters are allowed or denied.

QuoteProperties string
QuoteStyle string
Regex string
RestrictedModifier string
RuleAssistConfiguration_for_OrganizeImportsOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_OrganizeImportsOptions
RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedAttributesOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_UseSortedAttributesOptions

RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedPropertiesOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_UseSortedPropertiesOptions
