Rules object
a11y SeverityOrGroup_for_A11y | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_A11y GroupPlainConfiguration | A11y, null null
complexity SeverityOrGroup_for_Complexity | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Complexity GroupPlainConfiguration | Complexity, null null
correctness SeverityOrGroup_for_Correctness | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Correctness GroupPlainConfiguration | Correctness, null null
nursery SeverityOrGroup_for_Nursery | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Nursery GroupPlainConfiguration | Nursery, null null
performance SeverityOrGroup_for_Performance | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Performance GroupPlainConfiguration | Performance, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the lint rules recommended by Biome. true by default.

security SeverityOrGroup_for_Security | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Security GroupPlainConfiguration | Security, null null
style SeverityOrGroup_for_Style | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Style GroupPlainConfiguration | Style, null null
suspicious SeverityOrGroup_for_Suspicious | null
Any of: SeverityOrGroup_for_Suspicious GroupPlainConfiguration | Suspicious, null null
Schema string
Scope string
Security object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noBlankTarget NoBlankTargetConfiguration | null

Disallow target="_blank" attribute without rel="noopener".

Any of: NoBlankTargetConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBlankTargetOptions, null null
noDangerouslySetInnerHtml NoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlConfiguration | null

Prevent the usage of dangerous JSX props

Any of: NoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlOptions, null null
noDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildren NoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildrenConfiguration | null

Report when a DOM element or a component uses both children and dangerouslySetInnerHTML prop.

Any of: NoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildrenConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildrenOptions, null null
noGlobalEval NoGlobalEvalConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of global eval().

Any of: NoGlobalEvalConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalEvalOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

Selector object
kind

Declaration kind

All of: Kind string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string | string
modifiers

Modifiers used on the declaration

All of: Modifiers RestrictedModifier[]
scope

Scope of the declaration

All of: Scope string
SelfCloseVoidElements string | string

Controls whether void-elements should be self closed

Semicolons string
SeverityOrGroup_for_A11y GroupPlainConfiguration | A11y
SeverityOrGroup_for_Complexity GroupPlainConfiguration | Complexity
SeverityOrGroup_for_Correctness GroupPlainConfiguration | Correctness
SeverityOrGroup_for_Nursery GroupPlainConfiguration | Nursery
SeverityOrGroup_for_Performance GroupPlainConfiguration | Performance
SeverityOrGroup_for_Security GroupPlainConfiguration | Security
SeverityOrGroup_for_Style GroupPlainConfiguration | Style
SeverityOrGroup_for_Suspicious GroupPlainConfiguration | Suspicious
SortOrder string
Source object

A list of rules that belong to this group

organizeImports RuleAssistConfiguration_for_OrganizeImportsOptions | null

Provides a code action to sort the imports and exports in the file using a built-in or custom order.

Any of: RuleAssistConfiguration_for_OrganizeImportsOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_OrganizeImportsOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useSortedAttributes RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedAttributesOptions | null

Enforce attribute sorting in JSX elements.

Any of: RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedAttributesOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_UseSortedAttributesOptions, null null
useSortedKeys RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedKeysOptions | null

Sorts the keys of a JSON object in natural order

Any of: RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedKeysOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_UseSortedKeysOptions, null null
useSortedProperties RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedPropertiesOptions | null

Enforce ordering of CSS properties and nested rules.

Any of: RuleAssistConfiguration_for_UseSortedPropertiesOptions RuleAssistPlainConfiguration | RuleAssistWithOptions_for_UseSortedPropertiesOptions, null null
SourceMatcher NegatablePredefinedSourceMatcher | ImportSourceGlob
SourcesMatcher SourceMatcher | SourceMatcher[]
StableHookResult boolean | integer[] | string[]
Style object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noCommonJs NoCommonJsConfiguration | null

Disallow use of CommonJs module system in favor of ESM style imports.

Any of: NoCommonJsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoCommonJsOptions, null null
noDefaultExport NoDefaultExportConfiguration | null

Disallow default exports.

Any of: NoDefaultExportConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDefaultExportOptions, null null
noDescendingSpecificity NoDescendingSpecificityConfiguration | null

Disallow a lower specificity selector from coming after a higher specificity selector.

Any of: NoDescendingSpecificityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDescendingSpecificityOptions, null null
noDoneCallback NoDoneCallbackConfiguration | null

Disallow using a callback in asynchronous tests and hooks.

Any of: NoDoneCallbackConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDoneCallbackOptions, null null
noEnum NoEnumConfiguration | null

Disallow TypeScript enum.

Any of: NoEnumConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEnumOptions, null null
noExportedImports NoExportedImportsConfiguration | null

Disallow exporting an imported variable.

Any of: NoExportedImportsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExportedImportsOptions, null null
noHeadElement NoHeadElementConfiguration | null

Prevent usage of <head> element in a Next.js project.

Any of: NoHeadElementConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoHeadElementOptions, null null
noImplicitBoolean NoImplicitBooleanConfiguration | null

Disallow implicit true values on JSX boolean attributes

Any of: NoImplicitBooleanConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImplicitBooleanOptions, null null
noInferrableTypes NoInferrableTypesConfiguration | null

Disallow type annotations for variables, parameters, and class properties initialized with a literal expression.

Any of: NoInferrableTypesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoInferrableTypesOptions, null null
noMagicNumbers NoMagicNumbersConfiguration | null

Reports usage of "magic numbers" — numbers used directly instead of being assigned to named constants.

Any of: NoMagicNumbersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMagicNumbersOptions, null null
noNamespace NoNamespaceConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of TypeScript's namespaces.

Any of: NoNamespaceConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNamespaceOptions, null null
noNegationElse NoNegationElseConfiguration | null

Disallow negation in the condition of an if statement if it has an else clause.

Any of: NoNegationElseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNegationElseOptions, null null
noNestedTernary NoNestedTernaryConfiguration | null

Disallow nested ternary expressions.

Any of: NoNestedTernaryConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNestedTernaryOptions, null null
noNonNullAssertion NoNonNullAssertionConfiguration | null

Disallow non-null assertions using the ! postfix operator.

Any of: NoNonNullAssertionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoNonNullAssertionOptions, null null
noParameterAssign NoParameterAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow reassigning function parameters.

Any of: NoParameterAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoParameterAssignOptions, null null
noParameterProperties NoParameterPropertiesConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of parameter properties in class constructors.

Any of: NoParameterPropertiesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoParameterPropertiesOptions, null null
noProcessEnv NoProcessEnvConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of process.env.

Any of: NoProcessEnvConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoProcessEnvOptions, null null
noRestrictedGlobals NoRestrictedGlobalsConfiguration | null

This rule allows you to specify global variable names that you don’t want to use in your application.

Any of: NoRestrictedGlobalsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRestrictedGlobalsOptions, null null
noRestrictedImports NoRestrictedImportsConfiguration | null

Disallow specified modules when loaded by import or require.

Any of: NoRestrictedImportsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRestrictedImportsOptions, null null
noRestrictedTypes NoRestrictedTypesConfiguration | null

Disallow user defined types.

Any of: NoRestrictedTypesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRestrictedTypesOptions, null null
noShoutyConstants NoShoutyConstantsConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of constants which its value is the upper-case version of its name.

Any of: NoShoutyConstantsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoShoutyConstantsOptions, null null
noSubstr NoSubstrConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of String.slice() over String.substr() and String.substring().

Any of: NoSubstrConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSubstrOptions, null null
noUnusedTemplateLiteral NoUnusedTemplateLiteralConfiguration | null

Disallow template literals if interpolation and special-character handling are not needed

Any of: NoUnusedTemplateLiteralConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnusedTemplateLiteralOptions, null null
noUselessElse NoUselessElseConfiguration | null

Disallow else block when the if block breaks early.

Any of: NoUselessElseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessElseOptions, null null
noValueAtRule NoValueAtRuleConfiguration | null

Disallow use of @value rule in css modules.

Any of: NoValueAtRuleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoValueAtRuleOptions, null null
noYodaExpression NoYodaExpressionConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of yoda expressions.

Any of: NoYodaExpressionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoYodaExpressionOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useArrayLiterals UseArrayLiteralsConfiguration | null

Disallow Array constructors.

Any of: UseArrayLiteralsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseArrayLiteralsOptions, null null
useAsConstAssertion UseAsConstAssertionConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of as const over literal type and type annotation.

Any of: UseAsConstAssertionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAsConstAssertionOptions, null null
useAtIndex UseAtIndexConfiguration | null

Use at() instead of integer index access.

Any of: UseAtIndexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAtIndexOptions, null null
useBlockStatements UseBlockStatementsConfiguration | null

Requires following curly brace conventions.

Any of: UseBlockStatementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseBlockStatementsOptions, null null
useCollapsedElseIf UseCollapsedElseIfConfiguration | null

Enforce using else if instead of nested if in else clauses.

Any of: UseCollapsedElseIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseCollapsedElseIfOptions, null null
useCollapsedIf UseCollapsedIfConfiguration | null

Enforce using single if instead of nested if clauses.

Any of: UseCollapsedIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseCollapsedIfOptions, null null
useComponentExportOnlyModules UseComponentExportOnlyModulesConfiguration | null

Enforce declaring components only within modules that export React Components exclusively.

Any of: UseComponentExportOnlyModulesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseComponentExportOnlyModulesOptions, null null
useConsistentArrayType UseConsistentArrayTypeConfiguration | null

Require consistently using either T[] or Array<T>

Any of: UseConsistentArrayTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentArrayTypeOptions, null null
useConsistentBuiltinInstantiation UseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of new for all builtins, except String, Number and Boolean.

Any of: UseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationOptions, null null
useConsistentCurlyBraces UseConsistentCurlyBracesConfiguration | null

This rule enforces consistent use of curly braces inside JSX attributes and JSX children.

Any of: UseConsistentCurlyBracesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentCurlyBracesOptions, null null
useConsistentMemberAccessibility UseConsistentMemberAccessibilityConfiguration | null

Require consistent accessibility modifiers on class properties and methods.

Any of: UseConsistentMemberAccessibilityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentMemberAccessibilityOptions, null null
useConsistentObjectDefinitions UseConsistentObjectDefinitionsConfiguration | null

Require the consistent declaration of object literals. Defaults to explicit definitions.

Any of: UseConsistentObjectDefinitionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentObjectDefinitionsOptions, null null
useConst UseConstConfiguration | null

Require const declarations for variables that are only assigned once.

Any of: UseConstConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConstOptions, null null
useDefaultParameterLast UseDefaultParameterLastConfiguration | null

Enforce default function parameters and optional function parameters to be last.

Any of: UseDefaultParameterLastConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDefaultParameterLastOptions, null null
useDefaultSwitchClause UseDefaultSwitchClauseConfiguration | null

Require the default clause in switch statements.

Any of: UseDefaultSwitchClauseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDefaultSwitchClauseOptions, null null
useDeprecatedReason UseDeprecatedReasonConfiguration | null

Require specifying the reason argument when using @deprecated directive

Any of: UseDeprecatedReasonConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDeprecatedReasonOptions, null null
useEnumInitializers UseEnumInitializersConfiguration | null

Require that each enum member value be explicitly initialized.

Any of: UseEnumInitializersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseEnumInitializersOptions, null null
useExplicitLengthCheck UseExplicitLengthCheckConfiguration | null

Enforce explicitly comparing the length, size, byteLength or byteOffset property of a value.

Any of: UseExplicitLengthCheckConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExplicitLengthCheckOptions, null null
useExponentiationOperator UseExponentiationOperatorConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of Math.pow in favor of the ** operator.

Any of: UseExponentiationOperatorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExponentiationOperatorOptions, null null
useExportType UseExportTypeConfiguration | null

Promotes the use of export type for types.

Any of: UseExportTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExportTypeOptions, null null
useExportsLast UseExportsLastConfiguration | null

Require that all exports are declared after all non-export statements.

Any of: UseExportsLastConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseExportsLastOptions, null null
useFilenamingConvention UseFilenamingConventionConfiguration | null

Enforce naming conventions for JavaScript and TypeScript filenames.

Any of: UseFilenamingConventionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseFilenamingConventionOptions, null null
useForOf UseForOfConfiguration | null

Prefer using for...of loops over standard for loops where possible.

Any of: UseForOfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseForOfOptions, null null
useFragmentSyntax UseFragmentSyntaxConfiguration | null

This rule enforces the use of <>...</> over <Fragment>...</Fragment>.

Any of: UseFragmentSyntaxConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseFragmentSyntaxOptions, null null
useGraphqlNamingConvention UseGraphqlNamingConventionConfiguration | null

Validates that all enum values are capitalized.

Any of: UseGraphqlNamingConventionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGraphqlNamingConventionOptions, null null
useGroupedAccessorPairs UseGroupedAccessorPairsConfiguration | null

Enforce that getters and setters for the same property are adjacent in class and object definitions.

Any of: UseGroupedAccessorPairsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGroupedAccessorPairsOptions, null null
useImportType UseImportTypeConfiguration | null

Promotes the use of import type for types.

Any of: UseImportTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseImportTypeOptions, null null
useLiteralEnumMembers UseLiteralEnumMembersConfiguration | null

Require all enum members to be literal values.

Any of: UseLiteralEnumMembersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseLiteralEnumMembersOptions, null null
useNamingConvention UseNamingConventionConfiguration | null

Enforce naming conventions for everything across a codebase.

Any of: UseNamingConventionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNamingConventionOptions, null null
useNodeAssertStrict UseNodeAssertStrictConfiguration | null

Promotes the usage of node:assert/strict over node:assert.

Any of: UseNodeAssertStrictConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNodeAssertStrictOptions, null null
useNodejsImportProtocol UseNodejsImportProtocolConfiguration | null

Enforces using the node: protocol for Node.js builtin modules.

Any of: UseNodejsImportProtocolConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNodejsImportProtocolOptions, null null
useNumberNamespace UseNumberNamespaceConfiguration | null

Use the Number properties instead of global ones.

Any of: UseNumberNamespaceConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNumberNamespaceOptions, null null
useNumericSeparators UseNumericSeparatorsConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of numeric separators in numeric literals.

Any of: UseNumericSeparatorsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNumericSeparatorsOptions, null null
useObjectSpread UseObjectSpreadConfiguration | null

Prefer object spread over Object.assign() when constructing new objects.

Any of: UseObjectSpreadConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseObjectSpreadOptions, null null
useReadonlyClassProperties UseReadonlyClassPropertiesConfiguration | null

Enforce marking members as readonly if they are never modified outside the constructor.

Any of: UseReadonlyClassPropertiesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseReadonlyClassPropertiesOptions, null null
useSelfClosingElements UseSelfClosingElementsConfiguration | null

Prevent extra closing tags for components without children.

Any of: UseSelfClosingElementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSelfClosingElementsOptions, null null
useShorthandAssign UseShorthandAssignConfiguration | null

Require assignment operator shorthand where possible.

Any of: UseShorthandAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseShorthandAssignOptions, null null
useShorthandFunctionType UseShorthandFunctionTypeConfiguration | null

Enforce using function types instead of object type with call signatures.

Any of: UseShorthandFunctionTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseShorthandFunctionTypeOptions, null null
useSingleVarDeclarator UseSingleVarDeclaratorConfiguration | null

Disallow multiple variable declarations in the same variable statement

Any of: UseSingleVarDeclaratorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSingleVarDeclaratorOptions, null null
useSymbolDescription UseSymbolDescriptionConfiguration | null

Require a description parameter for the Symbol().

Any of: UseSymbolDescriptionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseSymbolDescriptionOptions, null null
useTemplate UseTemplateConfiguration | null

Prefer template literals over string concatenation.

Any of: UseTemplateConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseTemplateOptions, null null
useThrowNewError UseThrowNewErrorConfiguration | null

Require new when throwing an error.

Any of: UseThrowNewErrorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseThrowNewErrorOptions, null null
useThrowOnlyError UseThrowOnlyErrorConfiguration | null

Disallow throwing non-Error values.

Any of: UseThrowOnlyErrorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseThrowOnlyErrorOptions, null null
useTrimStartEnd UseTrimStartEndConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of String.trimStart() and String.trimEnd() over String.trimLeft() and String.trimRight().

Any of: UseTrimStartEndConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseTrimStartEndOptions, null null
useUnifiedTypeSignatures UseUnifiedTypeSignaturesConfiguration | null

Disallow overload signatures that can be unified into a single signature.

Any of: UseUnifiedTypeSignaturesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseUnifiedTypeSignaturesOptions, null null
Style2 string | string | string

Rule's options.

Suspicious object

A list of rules that belong to this group

noAlert NoAlertConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of alert, confirm, and prompt.

Any of: NoAlertConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAlertOptions, null null
noApproximativeNumericConstant NoApproximativeNumericConstantConfiguration | null

Use standard constants instead of approximated literals.

Any of: NoApproximativeNumericConstantConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoApproximativeNumericConstantOptions, null null
noArrayIndexKey NoArrayIndexKeyConfiguration | null

Discourage the usage of Array index in keys.

Any of: NoArrayIndexKeyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoArrayIndexKeyOptions, null null
noAssignInExpressions NoAssignInExpressionsConfiguration | null

Disallow assignments in expressions.

Any of: NoAssignInExpressionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAssignInExpressionsOptions, null null
noAsyncPromiseExecutor NoAsyncPromiseExecutorConfiguration | null

Disallows using an async function as a Promise executor.

Any of: NoAsyncPromiseExecutorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoAsyncPromiseExecutorOptions, null null
noBiomeFirstException NoBiomeFirstExceptionConfiguration | null

Prevents the use of the ! pattern in the first position of files.includes in the configuration file.

Any of: NoBiomeFirstExceptionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBiomeFirstExceptionOptions, null null
noBitwiseOperators NoBitwiseOperatorsConfiguration | null

Disallow bitwise operators.

Any of: NoBitwiseOperatorsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoBitwiseOperatorsOptions, null null
noCatchAssign NoCatchAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow reassigning exceptions in catch clauses.

Any of: NoCatchAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoCatchAssignOptions, null null
noClassAssign NoClassAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow reassigning class members.

Any of: NoClassAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoClassAssignOptions, null null
noCommentText NoCommentTextConfiguration | null

Prevent comments from being inserted as text nodes

Any of: NoCommentTextConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoCommentTextOptions, null null
noCompareNegZero NoCompareNegZeroConfiguration | null

Disallow comparing against -0

Any of: NoCompareNegZeroConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoCompareNegZeroOptions, null null
noConfusingLabels NoConfusingLabelsConfiguration | null

Disallow labeled statements that are not loops.

Any of: NoConfusingLabelsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConfusingLabelsOptions, null null
noConfusingVoidType NoConfusingVoidTypeConfiguration | null

Disallow void type outside of generic or return types.

Any of: NoConfusingVoidTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConfusingVoidTypeOptions, null null
noConsole NoConsoleConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of console.

Any of: NoConsoleConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConsoleOptions, null null
noConstEnum NoConstEnumConfiguration | null

Disallow TypeScript const enum

Any of: NoConstEnumConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstEnumOptions, null null
noConstantBinaryExpressions NoConstantBinaryExpressionsConfiguration | null

Disallow expressions where the operation doesn't affect the value

Any of: NoConstantBinaryExpressionsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoConstantBinaryExpressionsOptions, null null
noControlCharactersInRegex NoControlCharactersInRegexConfiguration | null

Prevents from having control characters and some escape sequences that match control characters in regular expression literals.

Any of: NoControlCharactersInRegexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoControlCharactersInRegexOptions, null null
noDebugger NoDebuggerConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of debugger

Any of: NoDebuggerConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDebuggerOptions, null null
noDocumentCookie NoDocumentCookieConfiguration | null

Disallow direct assignments to document.cookie.

Any of: NoDocumentCookieConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDocumentCookieOptions, null null
noDocumentImportInPage NoDocumentImportInPageConfiguration | null

Prevents importing next/document outside of pages/_document.jsx in Next.js projects.

Any of: NoDocumentImportInPageConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDocumentImportInPageOptions, null null
noDoubleEquals NoDoubleEqualsConfiguration | null

Require the use of === and !==.

Any of: NoDoubleEqualsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDoubleEqualsOptions, null null
noDuplicateAtImportRules NoDuplicateAtImportRulesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate @import rules.

Any of: NoDuplicateAtImportRulesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateAtImportRulesOptions, null null
noDuplicateCase NoDuplicateCaseConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate case labels.

Any of: NoDuplicateCaseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateCaseOptions, null null
noDuplicateClassMembers NoDuplicateClassMembersConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate class members.

Any of: NoDuplicateClassMembersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateClassMembersOptions, null null
noDuplicateCustomProperties NoDuplicateCustomPropertiesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate custom properties within declaration blocks.

Any of: NoDuplicateCustomPropertiesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateCustomPropertiesOptions, null null
noDuplicateElseIf NoDuplicateElseIfConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate conditions in if-else-if chains

Any of: NoDuplicateElseIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateElseIfOptions, null null
noDuplicateFields NoDuplicateFieldsConfiguration | null

No duplicated fields in GraphQL operations.

Any of: NoDuplicateFieldsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateFieldsOptions, null null
noDuplicateFontNames NoDuplicateFontNamesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate names within font families.

Any of: NoDuplicateFontNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateFontNamesOptions, null null
noDuplicateJsxProps NoDuplicateJsxPropsConfiguration | null

Prevents JSX properties to be assigned multiple times.

Any of: NoDuplicateJsxPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateJsxPropsOptions, null null
noDuplicateObjectKeys NoDuplicateObjectKeysConfiguration | null

Disallow two keys with the same name inside objects.

Any of: NoDuplicateObjectKeysConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateObjectKeysOptions, null null
noDuplicateParameters NoDuplicateParametersConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate function parameter name.

Any of: NoDuplicateParametersConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateParametersOptions, null null
noDuplicateProperties NoDuplicatePropertiesConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate properties within declaration blocks.

Any of: NoDuplicatePropertiesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicatePropertiesOptions, null null
noDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlock NoDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlockConfiguration | null

Disallow duplicate selectors within keyframe blocks.

Any of: NoDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlockConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateSelectorsKeyframeBlockOptions, null null
noDuplicateTestHooks NoDuplicateTestHooksConfiguration | null

A describe block should not contain duplicate hooks.

Any of: NoDuplicateTestHooksConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoDuplicateTestHooksOptions, null null
noEmptyBlock NoEmptyBlockConfiguration | null

Disallow CSS empty blocks.

Any of: NoEmptyBlockConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyBlockOptions, null null
noEmptyBlockStatements NoEmptyBlockStatementsConfiguration | null

Disallow empty block statements and static blocks.

Any of: NoEmptyBlockStatementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyBlockStatementsOptions, null null
noEmptyInterface NoEmptyInterfaceConfiguration | null

Disallow the declaration of empty interfaces.

Any of: NoEmptyInterfaceConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEmptyInterfaceOptions, null null
noEvolvingTypes NoEvolvingTypesConfiguration | null

Disallow variables from evolving into any type through reassignments.

Any of: NoEvolvingTypesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoEvolvingTypesOptions, null null
noExplicitAny NoExplicitAnyConfiguration | null

Disallow the any type usage.

Any of: NoExplicitAnyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExplicitAnyOptions, null null
noExportsInTest NoExportsInTestConfiguration | null

Disallow using export or module.exports in files containing tests

Any of: NoExportsInTestConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExportsInTestOptions, null null
noExtraNonNullAssertion NoExtraNonNullAssertionConfiguration | null

Prevents the wrong usage of the non-null assertion operator (!) in TypeScript files.

Any of: NoExtraNonNullAssertionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoExtraNonNullAssertionOptions, null null
noFallthroughSwitchClause NoFallthroughSwitchClauseConfiguration | null

Disallow fallthrough of switch clauses.

Any of: NoFallthroughSwitchClauseConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFallthroughSwitchClauseOptions, null null
noFocusedTests NoFocusedTestsConfiguration | null

Disallow focused tests.

Any of: NoFocusedTestsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFocusedTestsOptions, null null
noFunctionAssign NoFunctionAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow reassigning function declarations.

Any of: NoFunctionAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoFunctionAssignOptions, null null
noGlobalAssign NoGlobalAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow assignments to native objects and read-only global variables.

Any of: NoGlobalAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalAssignOptions, null null
noGlobalIsFinite NoGlobalIsFiniteConfiguration | null

Use Number.isFinite instead of global isFinite.

Any of: NoGlobalIsFiniteConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalIsFiniteOptions, null null
noGlobalIsNan NoGlobalIsNanConfiguration | null

Use Number.isNaN instead of global isNaN.

Any of: NoGlobalIsNanConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoGlobalIsNanOptions, null null
noHeadImportInDocument NoHeadImportInDocumentConfiguration | null

Prevent using the next/head module in pages/_document.js on Next.js projects.

Any of: NoHeadImportInDocumentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoHeadImportInDocumentOptions, null null
noImplicitAnyLet NoImplicitAnyLetConfiguration | null

Disallow use of implicit any type on variable declarations.

Any of: NoImplicitAnyLetConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImplicitAnyLetOptions, null null
noImportAssign NoImportAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow assigning to imported bindings

Any of: NoImportAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportAssignOptions, null null
noImportantInKeyframe NoImportantInKeyframeConfiguration | null

Disallow invalid !important within keyframe declarations

Any of: NoImportantInKeyframeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoImportantInKeyframeOptions, null null
noIrregularWhitespace NoIrregularWhitespaceConfiguration | null

Disallows the use of irregular whitespace characters.

Any of: NoIrregularWhitespaceConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoIrregularWhitespaceOptions, null null
noLabelVar NoLabelVarConfiguration | null

Disallow labels that share a name with a variable

Any of: NoLabelVarConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoLabelVarOptions, null null
noMisleadingCharacterClass NoMisleadingCharacterClassConfiguration | null

Disallow characters made with multiple code points in character class syntax.

Any of: NoMisleadingCharacterClassConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisleadingCharacterClassOptions, null null
noMisleadingInstantiator NoMisleadingInstantiatorConfiguration | null

Enforce proper usage of new and constructor.

Any of: NoMisleadingInstantiatorConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisleadingInstantiatorOptions, null null
noMisplacedAssertion NoMisplacedAssertionConfiguration | null

Checks that the assertion function, for example expect, is placed inside an it() function call.

Any of: NoMisplacedAssertionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisplacedAssertionOptions, null null
noMisrefactoredShorthandAssign NoMisrefactoredShorthandAssignConfiguration | null

Disallow shorthand assign when variable appears on both sides.

Any of: NoMisrefactoredShorthandAssignConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoMisrefactoredShorthandAssignOptions, null null
noOctalEscape NoOctalEscapeConfiguration | null

Disallow octal escape sequences in string literals

Any of: NoOctalEscapeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoOctalEscapeOptions, null null
noPrototypeBuiltins NoPrototypeBuiltinsConfiguration | null

Disallow direct use of Object.prototype builtins.

Any of: NoPrototypeBuiltinsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoPrototypeBuiltinsOptions, null null
noQuickfixBiome NoQuickfixBiomeConfiguration | null

Disallow the use if quickfix.biome inside editor settings file.

Any of: NoQuickfixBiomeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoQuickfixBiomeOptions, null null
noReactSpecificProps NoReactSpecificPropsConfiguration | null

Prevents React-specific JSX properties from being used.

Any of: NoReactSpecificPropsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoReactSpecificPropsOptions, null null
noRedeclare NoRedeclareConfiguration | null

Disallow variable, function, class, and type redeclarations in the same scope.

Any of: NoRedeclareConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRedeclareOptions, null null
noRedundantUseStrict NoRedundantUseStrictConfiguration | null

Prevents from having redundant "use strict".

Any of: NoRedundantUseStrictConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoRedundantUseStrictOptions, null null
noSelfCompare NoSelfCompareConfiguration | null

Disallow comparisons where both sides are exactly the same.

Any of: NoSelfCompareConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSelfCompareOptions, null null
noShadowRestrictedNames NoShadowRestrictedNamesConfiguration | null

Disallow identifiers from shadowing restricted names.

Any of: NoShadowRestrictedNamesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoShadowRestrictedNamesOptions, null null
noShorthandPropertyOverrides NoShorthandPropertyOverridesConfiguration | null

Disallow shorthand properties that override related longhand properties.

Any of: NoShorthandPropertyOverridesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoShorthandPropertyOverridesOptions, null null
noSkippedTests NoSkippedTestsConfiguration | null

Disallow disabled tests.

Any of: NoSkippedTestsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSkippedTestsOptions, null null
noSparseArray NoSparseArrayConfiguration | null

Prevents the use of sparse arrays (arrays with holes).

Any of: NoSparseArrayConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSparseArrayOptions, null null
noSuspiciousSemicolonInJsx NoSuspiciousSemicolonInJsxConfiguration | null

It detects possible "wrong" semicolons inside JSX elements.

Any of: NoSuspiciousSemicolonInJsxConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoSuspiciousSemicolonInJsxOptions, null null
noTemplateCurlyInString NoTemplateCurlyInStringConfiguration | null

Disallow template literal placeholder syntax in regular strings.

Any of: NoTemplateCurlyInStringConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoTemplateCurlyInStringOptions, null null
noThenProperty NoThenPropertyConfiguration | null

Disallow then property.

Any of: NoThenPropertyConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoThenPropertyOptions, null null
noTsIgnore NoTsIgnoreConfiguration | null

Prevents the use of the TypeScript directive @ts-ignore.

Any of: NoTsIgnoreConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoTsIgnoreOptions, null null
noUnassignedVariables NoUnassignedVariablesConfiguration | null

Disallow let or var variables that are read but never assigned.

Any of: NoUnassignedVariablesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnassignedVariablesOptions, null null
noUnknownAtRules NoUnknownAtRulesConfiguration | null

Disallow unknown at-rules.

Any of: NoUnknownAtRulesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnknownAtRulesOptions, null null
noUnsafeDeclarationMerging NoUnsafeDeclarationMergingConfiguration | null

Disallow unsafe declaration merging between interfaces and classes.

Any of: NoUnsafeDeclarationMergingConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnsafeDeclarationMergingOptions, null null
noUnsafeNegation NoUnsafeNegationConfiguration | null

Disallow using unsafe negation.

Any of: NoUnsafeNegationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUnsafeNegationOptions, null null
noUselessEscapeInString NoUselessEscapeInStringConfiguration | null

Disallow unnecessary escapes in string literals.

Any of: NoUselessEscapeInStringConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessEscapeInStringOptions, null null
noUselessRegexBackrefs NoUselessRegexBackrefsConfiguration | null

Disallow useless backreferences in regular expression literals that always match an empty string.

Any of: NoUselessRegexBackrefsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoUselessRegexBackrefsOptions, null null
noVar NoVarConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of var

Any of: NoVarConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoVarOptions, null null
noWith NoWithConfiguration | null

Disallow with statements in non-strict contexts.

Any of: NoWithConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithNoWithOptions, null null
recommended boolean | null

It enables the recommended rules for this group

useAdjacentOverloadSignatures UseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesConfiguration | null

Disallow the use of overload signatures that are not next to each other.

Any of: UseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesOptions, null null
useAwait UseAwaitConfiguration | null

Ensure async functions utilize await.

Any of: UseAwaitConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAwaitOptions, null null
useBiomeIgnoreFolder UseBiomeIgnoreFolderConfiguration | null

Promotes the correct usage for ignoring folders in the configuration file.

Any of: UseBiomeIgnoreFolderConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseBiomeIgnoreFolderOptions, null null
useDefaultSwitchClauseLast UseDefaultSwitchClauseLastConfiguration | null

Enforce default clauses in switch statements to be last

Any of: UseDefaultSwitchClauseLastConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseDefaultSwitchClauseLastOptions, null null
useErrorMessage UseErrorMessageConfiguration | null

Enforce passing a message value when creating a built-in error.

Any of: UseErrorMessageConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseErrorMessageOptions, null null
useGetterReturn UseGetterReturnConfiguration | null

Enforce get methods to always return a value.

Any of: UseGetterReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGetterReturnOptions, null null
useGoogleFontDisplay UseGoogleFontDisplayConfiguration | null

Enforces the use of a recommended display strategy with Google Fonts.

Any of: UseGoogleFontDisplayConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGoogleFontDisplayOptions, null null
useGuardForIn UseGuardForInConfiguration | null

Require for-in loops to include an if statement.

Any of: UseGuardForInConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseGuardForInOptions, null null
useIsArray UseIsArrayConfiguration | null

Use Array.isArray() instead of instanceof Array.

Any of: UseIsArrayConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseIsArrayOptions, null null
useIterableCallbackReturn UseIterableCallbackReturnConfiguration | null

Enforce consistent return values in iterable callbacks.

Any of: UseIterableCallbackReturnConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseIterableCallbackReturnOptions, null null
useNamespaceKeyword UseNamespaceKeywordConfiguration | null

Require using the namespace keyword over the module keyword to declare TypeScript namespaces.

Any of: UseNamespaceKeywordConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNamespaceKeywordOptions, null null
useNumberToFixedDigitsArgument UseNumberToFixedDigitsArgumentConfiguration | null

Enforce using the digits argument with Number#toFixed().

Any of: UseNumberToFixedDigitsArgumentConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseNumberToFixedDigitsArgumentOptions, null null
useStaticResponseMethods UseStaticResponseMethodsConfiguration | null

Use static Response methods instead of new Response() constructor when possible.

Any of: UseStaticResponseMethodsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseStaticResponseMethodsOptions, null null
useStrictMode UseStrictModeConfiguration | null

Enforce the use of the directive "use strict" in script files.

Any of: UseStrictModeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseStrictModeOptions, null null
TrailingCommas string | string | string

Print trailing commas wherever possible in multi-line comma-separated syntactic structures.

TrailingCommas2 string | string
UseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesOptions
UseAdjacentOverloadSignaturesOptions object

UseAltTextOptions object

UseAnchorContentOptions object

UseAnchorHrefOptions null

UseAriaActivedescendantWithTabindexOptions object

UseAriaPropsForRoleOptions object

UseAriaPropsSupportedByRoleOptions object

UseArrayLiteralsOptions object
UseArrowFunctionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseArrowFunctionOptions
UseArrowFunctionOptions object
UseAsConstAssertionConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAsConstAssertionOptions
UseAsConstAssertionOptions object
UseAtIndexConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAtIndexOptions
UseAtIndexOptions object
UseAwaitConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseAwaitOptions
UseAwaitOptions object
UseBiomeIgnoreFolderConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseBiomeIgnoreFolderOptions
UseBiomeIgnoreFolderOptions object
UseBlockStatementsConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseBlockStatementsOptions
UseBlockStatementsOptions object
UseButtonTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseButtonTypeOptions
UseButtonTypeOptions object
UseCollapsedElseIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseCollapsedElseIfOptions
UseCollapsedElseIfOptions object
UseCollapsedIfConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseCollapsedIfOptions
UseCollapsedIfOptions object
UseComponentExportOnlyModulesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseComponentExportOnlyModulesOptions
UseComponentExportOnlyModulesOptions object
allowConstantExport boolean

Allows the export of constants. This option is for environments that support it, such as Vite

Default: false
allowExportNames string[]

A list of names that can be additionally exported from the module This option is for exports that do not hinder React Fast Refresh, such as meta in Remix

UseConsistentArrayTypeConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentArrayTypeOptions
UseConsistentArrayTypeOptions object
syntax
Default: "shorthand"
All of: ConsistentArrayType string | string
UseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationOptions
UseConsistentBuiltinInstantiationOptions object
UseConsistentCurlyBracesConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentCurlyBracesOptions
UseConsistentCurlyBracesOptions object
UseConsistentMemberAccessibilityConfiguration RulePlainConfiguration | RuleWithUseConsistentMemberAccessibilityOptions
UseConsistentMemberAccessibilityOptions object

hooks Hook[]

List of hooks of which the dependencies should be validated.

Default:
[]
reportMissingDependenciesArray boolean

Whether to report an error when a hook has no dependencies array.

Default: false
reportUnnecessaryDependencies boolean

Whether to report an error when a dependency is listed in the dependencies array but isn't used. Defaults to true.

Default: true

VcsClientKind string
VcsConfiguration object

Set of properties to integrate Biome with a VCS software.

clientKind VcsClientKind | null

The kind of client.

Any of: VcsClientKind string, null null
defaultBranch string | null

The main branch of the project

enabled Bool | null

Whether Biome should integrate itself with the VCS client

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
root string | null

The folder where Biome should check for VCS files. By default, Biome will use the same folder where biome.json was found.

If Biome can't find the configuration, it will attempt to use the current working directory. If no current working directory can't be found, Biome won't use the VCS integration, and a diagnostic will be emitted

useIgnoreFile Bool | null

Whether Biome should use the VCS ignore file. When [true], Biome will ignore the files specified in the ignore file.

Any of: Bool boolean, null null
Visibility string
WhitespaceSensitivity string | string | string

Whitespace sensitivity for HTML formatting.

The following two cases won't produce the same output:

| | html | output | | -------------- | :------------: | :----------: | | with spaces | 1<b> 2 </b>3 | 1 2 3 | | without spaces | 1<b>2</b>3 | 123 |

This happens because whitespace is significant in inline elements.

As a consequence of this, the formatter must format blocks that look like this (assume a small line width, <20): html <span>really long content</span> as this, where the content hugs the tags: html <span >really long content</span >

Note that this is only necessary for inline elements. Block elements do not have this restriction.

Generated by Lintel Catalog Builder 0.0.13
